headline: How Shifting Institutional Stakes and Macao Cultural Push Could Shape Las Vegas Sands' (LVS) Story
summary: In recent months, several major institutional investors have reshaped their positions in Las Vegas Sands, with Barrow Hanley Mewhinney & Strauss and Interval Partners increasing stakes while Capital Research Global Investors and Ceredex Value Advisors pared back holdings amid ongoing earnings and balance sheet concerns. At the same time, Sands China’s participation as an Associate Partner at Art Central in Hong Kong highlights Las Vegas Sands’ efforts to support Macao’s cultural development...
